moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, tees off from July 16-19 at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, with Scottie Scheffler defending his title.

angles.name: Major Golf Action
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is up for grabs! The Open Championship begins tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for glory? #TheOpen

angles.name: British Golf Focus
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale hosts The 154th Open from tomorrow. Get ready for four days of world-class golf on home soil. Will an English player lift the trophy?

moments.title: London Athletics Meet returns
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, part of the Wanda Diamond League, returns to the London Stadium on Saturday, July 18, featuring international track and field superstars.

angles.name: Athletics Excitement
angles.copy: Get set for some serious speed! The London Athletics Meet hits the London Stadium this Saturday. Who's your favourite to watch on the track?

angles.name: Weekend Sport in London
angles.copy: World-class athletics comes to London this weekend! Don't miss the Diamond League action at the London Stadium.

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, Splendour, takes place this weekend, July 18-19, at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, offering five stages of music across all genres.

angles.name: Nottingham Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is this weekend! Who's heading to Wollaton Hall for two days of amazing music? #SplendourFest

angles.name: Weekend Music Pick
angles.copy: Nottingham's biggest festival, Splendour, kicks off Saturday! Five stages, all genres – get ready for a brilliant weekend.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is live now in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, running from July 15-18, celebrating traditional and contemporary Celtic music.

angles.name: Celtic Fest Kicks Off
angles.copy: It's a huge week for music in the Outer Hebrides! The Hebridean Celtic Festival is live now until Saturday. Who's there for the craic?

angles.name: Scottish Festival Fun
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is underway! Four days of incredible music and culture in Stornoway.

moments.title: Buddhafield Festival
moments.blurb: Buddhafield Festival is currently running from July 15-19, offering a unique blend of community, connection, and wellbeing activities.

angles.name: Alternative Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Buddhafield Festival is happening now! Dive into five days of music, workshops, and community in a truly unique setting.

moments.title: The Hundred 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The Hundred, the 100-ball cricket competition, kicks off its 2026 season on Tuesday, July 21, with an opening double-header at the Kia Oval in London.

angles.name: Cricket Season Starts
angles.copy: Get ready for 100-ball action! The Hundred 2026 season starts next Tuesday. Who are you supporting this year?

angles.name: Welsh Fire Kicks Off
angles.copy: Good luck to Welsh Fire! Their Hundred campaign begins next Wednesday, July 22, against Southern Brave. Bring on the action!

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games are set to begin in Glasgow, Scotland, from July 23 to August 2, with the opening ceremony at the OVO Hydro on July 23.

angles.name: Commonwealth Countdown
angles.copy: Just over a week until the Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow! Who's excited for 10 days of incredible sport? #Glasgow2026

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Anticipation
angles.copy: Glasgow is ready! The Commonwealth Games opening ceremony is next Thursday, July 23. It's going to be huge!

moments.title: Latitude Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with music, comedy, arts, and more.

angles.name: Suffolk Festival Ready
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just over a week away! Celebrating 20 years of music, comedy and magic at Henham Park. Who's going?

angles.name: Arts and Music Extravaganza
angles.copy: Beyond the headliners, Latitude offers incredible arts, comedy, and more. Get ready for a weekend of discovery in Suffolk!

moments.title: WOMAD Festival 2026
moments.blurb: The World's Festival, WOMAD, takes place from July 23-26 at Neston Park, Wiltshire, celebrating global music, arts, dance, food, and culture.

angles.name: World Music Celebration
angles.copy: WOMAD Festival is next week! Immerse yourself in a world of music, dance, and culture at Neston Park. Who's excited?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean hold the top spot on the Official UK Singles Chart with their collaboration, 'Rein Me In'.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Still riding high! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is your Official UK Singles Chart Number 1. Are you loving it?

angles.name: New Music Reigning
angles.copy: It's official: 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean is the UK's biggest song right now! Tune in to hear it.

moments.title: Ann Droid on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan's new quirky comedy 'Ann Droid', where she stars as an eldercare robot, premiered on BBC this July and is available on iPlayer.

angles.name: New Comedy Must-Watch
angles.copy: If you need a laugh, Diane Morgan's new comedy 'Ann Droid' is now streaming on BBC iPlayer! Robot companion, what could go wrong?

angles.name: Catch Up TV
angles.copy: Missed the start of 'Ann Droid'? Catch up on Diane Morgan's latest comedy gem on BBC iPlayer – it's brilliant!

moments.title: The Dark on ITV
moments.blurb: The moody thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premiered on ITV this July, set in the Scottish wilderness.

angles.name: Thriller Alert
angles.copy: Looking for a new thriller? 'The Dark' is now on ITV! Get ready for a gripping mystery set in the Scottish wilderness.

angles.name: Scottish Drama
angles.copy: Helen Baxendale and Laura Donnelly star in 'The Dark', a new ITV thriller that's perfect for binge-watching. Have you started it yet?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's 80th Birthday
moments.blurb: Today, July 15, marks the 80th birthday of legendary American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile career spanning rock, country, and pop.

angles.name: Music Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to the iconic Linda Ronstadt! Her incredible voice has graced rock, country, and pop for decades. What's your favourite song?

moments.title: Olly Alexander's 36th Birthday
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Olly Alexander, frontman of Years & Years and recent Eurovision representative, celebrates his 36th birthday today, July 15.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to the brilliant Olly Alexander! From Years & Years to Eurovision, he always brings the energy. What's your top track?

moments.title: Ray Toro's 45th Birthday
moments.blurb: Ray Toro, the lead guitarist of My Chemical Romance, turns 45 today, July 15.

angles.name: Rock Guitarist Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 45th Birthday to My Chemical Romance's incredible guitarist, Ray Toro! What's your favourite MCR riff?

moments.title: Richard Marx's 63rd Birthday
moments.blurb: American pop/rock singer-songwriter Richard Marx, known for hits like 'Right Here Waiting', celebrates his 63rd birthday tomorrow, July 16.

angles.name: 80s Pop Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Richard Marx turns 63! Get ready to sing along to some classic power ballads. What's your go-to Richard Marx song?

moments.title: Priyanka Chopra's 44th Birthday
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Priyanka Chopra Jonas celebrates her 44th birthday on Friday, July 18.

angles.name: Global Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 44th Birthday to the multi-talented Priyanka Chopra Jonas this Friday! #PriyankaChopra

moments.title: Selena Gomez's 34th Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and producer Selena Gomez turns 34 on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Pop Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Next Wednesday, Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday! What's your favourite track from the pop superstar?

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist for the Eagles, will celebrate his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' legendary Don Henley next Wednesday! What's his best song, solo or with the band?

moments.title: Slash's 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist, Slash, known for his distinctive top hat and incredible riffs, turns 61 on Thursday, July 23.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday next Thursday to the one and only Slash! What's your favourite guitar solo from the Guns N' Roses legend?
